cut_id: #   B_staves = stave-laminated (10 staves around a buck)
# Both options produce the same final geometry; choose based on stock availability and shop preference.
# Stave-laminated uses less wood total but adds 2-3 days of glue-up time and a buck fixture.
# CNC-from-block is wood-wasteful but single-setup; cleaner for the v4 capstone schedule.
# Final-dimension columns marked "scaled" or "_calc" derive from cad/SAM-000_master-equations.txt
# and the family-spec.csv row for the variant. Do not hard-code; pull from the design table.
